title: Head of Accounts – Regional Bank – Singapore
description:
A regional bank is hiring a Head of Accounts to lead its Finance team in Singapore. This role oversees the finance function and covers the full spectrum of financial reporting, regulatory reporting, and financial management, playing a key role in strengthening financial governance and internal controls.

Your responsibilities will include:

  • Lead and manage the finance team covering regulatory reporting, financial reporting, MAS reporting, GST, and FP&A.
  • Oversee month-end, quarter-end, and year-end financial close processes, ensuring accuracy, timeliness, and compliance with accounting standards and regulatory requirements.
  • Act as the key finance lead for MAS reporting, statutory filings, audits, and regulatory submissions, ensuring strong governance and regulatory compliance.
  • Provide financial oversight, analysis, and insights to support senior management decision-making, budgeting, forecasting, and business planning.
  • Drive process improvements, strengthen internal controls, and develop the finance team through coaching and leadership.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline; professional qualifications (CA / CPA / ACCA) are preferred.
  • Strong experience leading finance teams, ideally at VP level or above, within a banking or regulated financial services environment.
  • Hands-on exposure across financial reporting, regulatory reporting, GST, and FP&A.
  • Proven people management and leadership capabilities.
  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.

Candidates who meet the above requirements are welcome to submit their updated CV.

Claire Ang (R22109899)

EA License: 22S1193

postedCompany.description:
In today's rapidly changing business environment, organisations need internal core capabilities that can adapt to complex and ambiguous external conditions. RevUp Consulting is founded upon the conviction that the right talents are pivotal to these capabilities.


Our founders have a combined century of experience in the industry and are dedicated to finding, attracting, and nurturing the right people for your organisation. Our teams share this commitment that the right people can Rev Up your business engines. With a vast network of C-suite personnel and mid/senior-level executives across the industries and functions we specialise in, we can partner with you to provide bespoke talent solutions to improve your internal processes, transform your operating model, strengthen governance frameworks, build/transform technology platforms, or drive top-line growth.  


At RevUp Consulting, we take a personalised and consultative approach to your talent strategy. We listen carefully to your strategic objectives, organizational culture, and workforce requirements, enabling us to develop highly customised talent mapping, search and attraction, selection, and talent engagement offerings that specifically align with your goals. 


As a result, we go far beyond simply providing resumes. 

We even go beyond the outcomes usually pursued by a contingency search service – placement numbers – to achieve an outstanding talent retention rate such that they make a real difference to you.  Whether you are a start-up, a multinational seeking to establish your presence in new territory, or a company undergoing transformation, we have the expertise to help you succeed in the specialist domains of:  


1. Financial Services

2. Medical and Consumer

3. Corporate functions (HR, Finance & Accounting & Legal)


In an uncertain world, we strive to provide certainty in perhaps the most vital element of your business: the quality of the professionals who power it.
postedCompany.name: REVUP CONSULTING PTE. LTD.
